problem.title: Stock Market Complexity for Beginners
problem.description: Individual investors with limited knowledge of how stocks work struggle to understand market trends, patterns, and fluctuations. The existing dashboard is too advanced with complex 3D visualizations and technical jargon that intimidates new users.
problem.solution-implemented: - Added Simple Mode with beginner-friendly language - Added Detailed Mode for advanced users - Toggle button to switch between modes

problem.title: Lack of Contextual Understanding
problem.description: Charts display data without explaining what's happening or why it matters. Users see numbers and visualizations but lack the framework to interpret them.
problem.solution-implemented: - Added ChartAnalysis component below each chart - Each chart has simple explanation (Simple Mode) - Each chart has detailed explanation (Detailed Mode) - explain.xml documents all chart explanations

problem.title: No Mode Differentiation
problem.description: The dashboard provides the same content to all users regardless of their expertise level. There's no simple mode for beginners and no detailed mode for advanced users.
problem.solution-implemented: - Simple Mode: 1 chart per tab initially (now 4) - Detailed Mode: All advanced charts (4 per tab) - Different language for each mode - Each tab has minimum 4 charts in both modes

problem.title: Insufficient Charts in Simple Mode
problem.description: Initial Simple Mode implementation only had 1-2 charts per tab, making the dashboard feel incomplete compared to Detailed Mode.
problem.solution-implemented: - All tabs now have 4 charts in both modes - Consistent chart count across Simple and Detailed modes
